minting_now.name: world's most famous artworks painted edition
minting_now.description:
the entire history of art compressed into 200 chaotic jpegs.

different centuries, different artists, different techniques, same essence.

1/1 world's most famous artworks of all time meticulously re-created with one hand and a mouse in paint.

minting_now.name: NFT FAM
minting_now.description:
This is more than a digital archive; it is a map of my journey through the on-chain world. Within this 10x10 grid lie the projects, the legends, and the creators I am proud to call my FAM.

These are the 100 collections that ignited my passion, the legends who kept me awake at night, and the communi

minting_now.name: Long Neck Society
minting_now.description: 222 Long Necks. One vibe per neck. 🦕 No roadmap. No promises. Just the most expressive dino on-chain.

minting_now.name: Dizcurd ManBebes
minting_now.description: Dizcurd ManBebes is da realest crew on da inturnet. We jumped rite into da NFT wurld an neber looked back. Eber Membooor collerts picshurz, hangz wit fwens on Dizcurd, ay postz dey feelz on X cuz das wut we do. If sumthin makez us mad, u bet da whole crew gon hear bout it in da DeeeMs. We stick toge

minting_now.name: Kattelmans
minting_now.description: KATTELMANS is a high-fidelity digital fashion collection on the Ethereum Base network, merging the world of premium 2D art with authentic streetwear culture. Our mission is to provide the Web3 community with hyper-realistic assets that represent their unique style and energy.

minting_now.name: BOY:SCAR
minting_now.description:
BOY:SCAR is a collection of cool, scar-marked boys—each one carrying a unique identity shaped by mystery, experience, and hidden power.
Every scar tells a different story. Some were earned, some were given, and some… are still awakening.
